about.content: I'm currently pursuing a B.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science and spending most of my time building with agentic AI. Over the last few years, I've competed in 11+ hackathons and finished on the podium at events like Innovatex and VIT HackFest. Right now, I'm building Markdrop, a visual markdown editor that helps developers ship clean READMEs faster.

projects.title: Markdrop
projects.description: I built Markdrop because writing README files in raw markdown slows me down. It gives you a visual editor, drag-and-drop blocks, and cloud sync so you can publish polished docs quickly.

projects.title: AnalyserGPT
projects.description: AnalyserGPT is a multi-agent data analysis app I built with Microsoft AutoGen. You can drop in a raw dataset, and the agents handle hypothesis generation, code writing, execution, and report creation. I containerized the runtime with Docker so generated code runs in an isolated, reproducible environment.

projects.title: KisaanCredit
projects.description: KisaanCredit helps small farmers access carbon credit markets. The platform uses satellite imagery and AI checks to verify sustainable farming activity, then records credits on-chain for traceability. We also added a gamified mobile flow to keep day-to-day usage simple.

projects.title: Replacement Calculator
projects.description: This app solves the Equipment Replacement Problem from Operations Research. Users enter maintenance, purchase, and resale values, and the tool computes the optimal replacement year. It also plots the average annual cost curve so the tradeoffs are easy to read.

hackathons.title: Minithon
hackathons.description: Ranked in **Top 8 finalists**. Built **TSEC Student Dashboard**, a responsive web app for managing student tasks and schedules.

hackathons.title: TSEC Innovatex
hackathons.description: Secured **3rd place**. Built **PaperSprint**, a platform for 15-minute print-and-delivery on campus with secure sign-in and cloud file support.

hackathons.title: Need for Code
hackathons.description: Built **MineSave**, a miner safety system that detects hazards and improves communication in low-connectivity underground environments.

hackathons.title: VIT Hackbuild
hackathons.description: Secured **Top 3 in Web/App domain**. Built **SkillVerse**, a student freelance marketplace with AI-assisted proposals, verified skill tests, and Solidity-based payment contracts.

hackathons.title: NABARD Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built **KisaanCredit**, a Soil-to-Sale platform that uses AI and blockchain to open carbon markets to farmers.

hackathons.title: Codeisance
hackathons.description: In a 24-hour hackathon, built **LifeSave**, a platform that connects donors, hospitals, and blood banks to speed up blood and organ matching.

hackathons.title: Smart India Hackathon (SIH)
hackathons.description: Qualified in the internal round. Built **CiviSeva**, a civic reporting app with geo-based routing, and **Forensight**, a digital forensics tool for automated evidence analysis and network visualization.

hackathons.title: Hacksync 2026
hackathons.description: Secured **Top 4 in AI/ML** and **Top 10 overall**. Built **Mirage**, an AI companion with real-time emotion detection, 3D avatar lip-sync, and contextual memory.

hackathons.title: Rubix 2026
hackathons.description: Secured **Top 10 overall**. Built **RubixProctor**, a proctoring system with dual-device 360-degree monitoring, bot detection, offline support, and system lockdown through a Chrome extension and Electron app.

hackathons.title: VIT HackFest Innov8 Tmrw 2026
hackathons.description: Won **1st Prize Overall**. Focused on sharp problem framing, fast iteration, and a polished final demo under tight timelines.

hackathons.title: TCET HACKANOVA 5.0
hackathons.description: Winner for the **Problem Statement**. Built **DebunkAI**, a real-time misinformation detection system that monitors social feeds, verifies claims against trusted sources, and generates structured fact-check reports with severity scoring.
